code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut max_val = 0
  mut min_val = 0
  mut found = false
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      match string.parse_int(s)
      when Some(num)
        if not found
          max_val = num
          min_val = num
          found = true
        else
          if num > max_val
            max_val = num
          end
          if num < min_val
            min_val = num
          end
        end
      when None
      end
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("max=#{max_val}")
  println("min=#{min_val}")
  Ok(())
end
